ideas.title: Proof-led platform story
ideas.prompt: Create a tall portrait campaign illustration for 'Proof-led platform story'. Use a risograph editorial broadside treatment. The core idea is: Replace with the core concept in plain English.. Art direction: misregistered ink, radical print-shop texture, and manifesto-like proof stacking with visible production grit. Compose it to fill a narrow editorial column from top to bottom with a strong upper focal zone. Avoid generic flat corporate vector art. Make it visually distinct from the other campaign ideas and premium in finish.
